event: Faust and Marguerite outside a Gothic Church
description: A scene set outside a large Gothic church or cathedral with elaborate pointed arches, flying buttresses, and ornate stonework. Several figures in medieval dress stand near the church entrance. A man and woman appear to be in conversation in the foreground. Other townsfolk, including a monk in dark robes, are scattered around the church exterior. A stone cross or market cross stands in the middle ground. The architecture dominates the composition with its intricate Gothic detailing rising into a cloudy sky.
